name: Carrots
variety_note: Use SHORT varieties (Paris Market, Chantenay) for 12-inch totes
min_depth_note: Short varieties only — long varieties need 12-18 in
pest_notes: Spring onions and mint deter carrot root fly. Rosemary also helps. KEEP AWAY FROM DILL.
container_notes: Must be direct sown — no transplants exist. Short varieties critical for tote depth. Thin to 3-inch spacing.
